description: Compact statistic display card showing a primary metric value, label, and optional secondary trend value with configurable color.

parameters.name: SubValue
parameters.description: Secondary value or trend indicator (e.g. "+12% this month").

parameters.name: SubValueColor
parameters.description: CSS classes for the SubValue color (e.g. "text-green-600").

examples.title: Stat card with trend
examples.code:
<TmStatCard Title="Total Revenue"
            Value="$45,231"
            SubValue="+12.5% from last month"
            SubValueColor="text-green-600" />
